zh.Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scotland, Unit: 英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安林利斯格福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun於1440年出生在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安林利斯格福時，他的父親William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun25歲，母親Margaret de Cathcart22歲。他於1458年10月25日與Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他去世於1488年6月11日在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾芭特爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun于1440年出生在英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安林利斯格福时，他的父亲William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun25岁，母亲Margaret de Cathcart22岁。他于1458年10月25日与Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他去世于1488年6月11日在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾芭特爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun was born in 1440, in Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun, was 25 and his mother, Margaret de Cathcart, was 22. He married Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross on 25 October 1458, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 11 June 1488, in Battle, Transvaal, South Africa, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun est né en 1440, à Linlithgow, West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Cathcart, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross le 25 octobre 1458, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1488, à Battle, Transvaal, Afrique du Sud, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scotland, Unit: Linlithgow, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun 1440 in Linlithgow, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun 25 und seine Mutter Margaret de Cathcart 22. Er hat am 25. Oktober 1458 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross geheiratet. Er starb am 11. Juni 1488 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Battle, Transvaal, Südafrika.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun è nato il nel 1440 nel Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Cathcart, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross il 25 ottobre 1458, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 giugno 1488, nel Battle, Transvaal, Sudafrica, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstounが1440年にイギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンリンリスゴウで生まれた時，父William Sempill VI of Elliotstounは25歳，母Margaret de Cathcartは22歳であった。1458年10月25日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでElizabeth Ross MacDonald Rossと結婚した。彼は1488年6月11日に南アフリカトランスヴァアルバットルで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun(이)가 1440년 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 린리스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Cathcart(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1458년 10월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1488년 6월 11일 남아프리카 트랜스바앨 바틀에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun nasceu em 1440, em Linlithgow, West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Cathcart, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross em 25 de outubro de 1458, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1488, em Battle, Transvaal, África do Sul, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Sempill of Eliotstoun родился в 1440 г. в местности линьлитгоу, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Sempill VI of Elliotstoun было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cathcart, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross 25 октября 1458 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 июня 1488 г. в местности баттл, трансвааль, Южная Африка в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Elizabeth Ross MacDonald Ross el 25 de octubre de 1458, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 11 de junio de 1488, en Battle, Transvaal, Sudáfrica, a la edad de 48 años.
